examples: Mandela was allowed few visitors in prison

meanings.definition: give as judged due or on the basis of merit
examples: the referee awarded a free kick to the team
the jury awarded a million dollars to the plaintiff
Funds are granted to qualified researchers
This bill grants us new rights

meanings.definition: give over; surrender or relinquish to the physical control of another

examples: given the engine's condition, it is a wonder that it started
